title: Mumble
summary:
“Mumble” depicts a magical-mesmerizing sculpture intent on murmuring something incomprehensible, maybe a spell or a prayer. The movement of the lips is continuous, while the light effect changes as the sculpture is flipped. And again a fossil appears, in this case as an eye. There is a question you might have while staring at the back of its clay head reflected on the plinth: what makes something alive in digital space?
Interaction:
Left mouse button/touch drag to rotate the scene
Scroll wheel/pinch to zoom
This artwork comes with an application for offline viewing and a 3D printable digital file.
